description_long: This object is a retro-style record player with a rectangular body featuring layered wood-like sides and a blue top surface. The turntable platter is black with a visible vinyl record and a central label, surrounded by a red tonearm and stylus assembly. Three red rectangular buttons and a set of four red control knobs are located on the front and side panels, adding a bold contrast to the blue and wood tones. The tonearm is positioned over the record, and the platter has visible grooves, enhancing its realistic appearance. The device sits flat and compact, with no visible dust cover, and the overall design is reminiscent of mid-century portable record players. The materials appear to be a combination of wood, plastic, and metal, with a smooth, matte finish.
description: A compact, retro record player with a blue top, wood-textured sides, red controls, and a black platter holding a vinyl record. The design features a red tonearm and multiple control knobs and buttons.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the red control knobs, three red buttons, and the tonearm resting on the record.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the four red control knobs on the front panel and the three red buttons on the top right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the layered wood texture and the tonearm positioned over the record, with minimal controls visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the red tonearm, platter, and the protruding red knob on the side.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and prominently visible, circular in shape, and black in color. It occupies a large portion of the top surface and holds a vinyl record with a central label. The platter has visible grooves and a matte finish, likely made of plastic or metal, and is slightly raised above the blue base.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, colored red, and extends from the back right corner toward the center of the platter. It is straight, of moderate length, and appears to be made of plastic with a matte finish. The tonearm is resting over the record, with a visible joint at its base.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is present, attached to the end of the tonearm, and is a small, distinct component. It appears as a red tip, likely made of plastic or metal, and is positioned over the record's grooves.
attribute_control_knobs: There are four control knobs on the front panel, all round and red, with a slightly raised design. Additionally, three rectangular red buttons are located on the top right of the device. The knobs and buttons are made of plastic and have a matte finish, with no visible labels or markings.
